ns0:entry.ns0:title: DataDog/serverless-sample-app
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DataDog/serverless-sample-app
Language: hcl
Explore Datadog's serverless observability features with this sample app.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: GoogleCloudPlatform/terraform-genai-doc-summarization
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/terraform-genai-doc-summarization
Language: hcl
Summarizes document using OCR and Vertex Generative AI LLM

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-backup
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudposse/terraform-aws-backup
Language: hcl
Terraform module to provision AWS Backup, a fully managed backup service that makes it easy to centralize and automate the back up of data across AWS services such as EBS volumes, RDS databases, DynamoDB tables, EFS file systems, and AWS Storage Gateway volumes.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-ec2-autoscale-group
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudposse/terraform-aws-ec2-autoscale-group
Language: hcl
Terraform module to provision Auto Scaling Group and Launch Template on AWS

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-ec2-bastion-server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudposse/terraform-aws-ec2-bastion-server
Language: hcl
Terraform module to define a generic Bastion host with parameterized user_data and support for AWS SSM Session Manager for remote access with IAM authentication.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-efs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudposse/terraform-aws-efs
Language: hcl
Terraform Module to define an EFS Filesystem (aka NFS)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-elasticache-redis
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudposse/terraform-aws-elasticache-redis
Language: hcl
Terraform module to provision an ElastiCache Redis Cluster

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-rds-cluster
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudposse/terraform-aws-rds-cluster
Language: hcl
Terraform module to provision an RDS Aurora cluster for MySQL or Postgres

ns0:entry.ns0:title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-eks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-eks
Language: hcl
Terraform module to create Amazon Elastic Kubernetes (EKS) resources 🇺🇦
